items.title: Indian politicians are campaigning while holding fish. What is going on?
items.dek: In West Bengal polls, fish moves from plate to politics, symbolising identity and cultural pride.
items.body: In West Bengal polls, fish moves from plate to politics, symbolising identity and cultural pride.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: What we know about the Iranian ship seized by the US
items.dek: The US has intercepted an Iranian ship entering the Gulf as part of its naval blockade, US President Donald Trump has said.
items.body: The US has intercepted an Iranian ship entering the Gulf as part of its naval blockade, US President Donald Trump has said.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Wemby captures DPOY as first unanimous winner
items.dek: Victor Wembanyama, 22, is both the youngest DPOY winner in NBA history and the first to win the award unanimously.
items.body: Victor Wembanyama, 22, is both the youngest DPOY winner in NBA history and the first to win the award unanimously.
items.author: IriLine Desk
